issues: verifier marked attempt as not passed

extra_model_fields.verifier_issues_summary: 1) Internal score/inference inconsistencies: rubric item ri_1 and overall semantic score reported as 1.0 in deterministic/rubric_item_scores in one section and as 0.0 in another section; overall 'passed' is shown both true and false in different parts of the grader result. 2) Grader claim that required machine-readable decision_table and calculation_workbook are missing is supported (no decision_table.csv/decision_table.json or explicit calculation_workbook file is present in artifact_refs or ActualOutputs.files_created), but there is an ambiguity: a created actual_outputs.json is mentioned in the trace steps/raw_step but is not included in ActualOutputs.files_created or artifact_content_refs, so the grader's assertion that machine-readable decision_table is absent is reasonable but the trace contains mixed signals. 3) The grader cites truncated artifact previews and states it relied on previews - this is supported: artifact_content_preview_truncated is true and previews are present. 4) No evidence of hidden-reference leakage was found in the provided traces/previews (hidden_reference_leaked=false), and that claim is consistent.

metadata_json.public_response_summary: Model verifier checked grounding and score consistency.

critical_issues: Inconsistent scoring and pass/fail indicators inside the grader result JSON reduce trust in the reported final_score (0.0) despite deterministic precheck passing (1.0).

Ambiguity about presence of a machine-readable manifest: trace steps indicate actual_outputs.json was created, but it is not present in ActualOutputs.files_created or artifact_content_refs; the rubric-required filenames (decision_table.csv/decision_table.json and calculation_workbook) are not present.

passed_checks.name: no_hidden_reference_leak
passed_checks.notes: No hidden test data content leaked in previews or trace.

passed_checks.name: machine_readable_decision_table_present
passed_checks.notes: No decision_table.csv or decision_table.json found in artifact refs; actual_outputs.json appears in trace but not among finalized artifact refs.

passed_checks.name: calculation_workbook_present
passed_checks.notes: No calculation_workbook (spreadsheet or equivalent) present in artifacts.

passed_checks.name: score_consistency_check
passed_checks.notes: Conflicting rubric_item and overall pass indicators.

recommendations: Clarify and normalize grader outputs so rubric_item_scores and final_score/passed are reported consistently in one canonical section.

If a machine-readable decision table is considered equivalent to actual_outputs.json, include it in artifact_refs and name it according to rubric requirements (decision_table.json or decision_table.csv) or document equivalence explicitly.
Include the calculation_workbook (spreadsheet or stepwise numeric workbook) as an artifact or reference to satisfy rubric partial-credit rules.
Ensure ActualOutputs.files_created reflects all files actually created in trace steps (e.g., actual_outputs.json) to avoid ambiguous absence claims.
unsupported_claims: Conflicting rubric_item scores: ri_1 scored 1.0 in the deterministic/rubric_item_scores section while later reported as 0.0 in model-judged rubric_item_scores.
Inconsistent overall 'passed' status across the grader_result JSON (both true and false reported).
